item.title: When fathers don’t pay child maintenance – what women can do to protect their children
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
When her ex-husband stopped paying maintenance overnight, one mother was left scrambling to cover her son’s expenses while navigating Singapore’s family courts alone – a situation many divorced women face. From understanding your rights to enforcing court orders, this is what the law provides when maintenance payments stop.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Kosovo's parliament fails to elect president, risking new election
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
PRISTINA, March 5 - Kosovo's parliament missed the deadline to elect a new president on Thursday, plunging the country into a fresh political crisis that could trigger another snap election.
Matched: parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US states sue to stop Trump’s latest global tariffs
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Lawsuit is to stop the 10% tariffs that Trump immediately imposed after US Supreme Court struck down previous tariffs.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), economy(+2)

item.title: US House of Representatives to vote on latest effort to halt Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Vote comes day after a parallel resolution failed in the Senate, underscoring Republican support for Trump-launched war.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: SIA, Scoot extend Middle East flight cancellations amid US-Israel war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
"As the situation remains fluid, other SIA flights may be affected," Singapore's flag carrier said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: How US sinking of Iranian warship blew hole in Modi’s ‘guardian’ claims
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
India sees itself a security provider in the Indian Ocean. On Wednesday, it couldn't save even its own guest.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US military's reported use of Claude raises questions about AI in warfare
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
AI is quickly becoming a mainstay of modern warfare, prompting pushback from some tech companies and sparking fresh debate about the ethics of military partnerships.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israeli army begins striking Hezbollah targets in Beirut's southern suburb
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Hezbollah said on Friday (Mar 6) that Israel's "aggression" would not go unchallenged.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US House rejects war powers resolution, backs Trump on Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The vote would not have stopped the conflict even if the House had voted yes.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US House narrowly rejects resolution to end Trump’s Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The US House votes 219-212 against a resolution requiring Congress's approval for further military action on Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Syria opens Mediterranean-Aleppo air corridor that could help ease regional snarl
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
DAMASCUS, March 5 - Syria has opened a newly reactivated air corridor from the northern city of Aleppo toward the Mediterranean Sea for use by foreign airlines as well as its national carrier, the head of the country’s Civil Aviation Authority told Reuters on Thursday, as air traffic gradually resumes through Aleppo International Airport.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump wants say on Iran’s next leader as Middle East conflict intensifies
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The US President also encourages ​Iranian Kurdish forces to go on the offensive.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Czech parliament votes to shield PM Babis from trial on EU subsidy fraud charges
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
PRAGUE, March 5 - The lower house of the Czech parliament voted on Thursday to deny a court request for billionaire businessman and Prime Minister Andrej Babis to face trial in long-running prosecution over an alleged fraud in drawing a European Union subsidy.
Matched: parliament(+2), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Cuba confirms fifth casualty in speedboat attack
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
HAVANA, March 5 - A fifth casualty from last week's speedboat attack on Cuba has been confirmed, the Cuban interior ministry said on Thursday night.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Explainer-Why is the US attacking Iran?
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - The United States and Israel launched their most ambitious attacks on Iran in decades on Saturday in an operation that killed Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Israel warns people to leave Beirut’s southern suburbs
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The area highlighted in the Israeli military map includes neighbourhoods controlled by Hezbollah.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: European police body warns Iran crisis raises threat of terror, extremism and cyberattacks
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Groups linked to Iran could seek to carry out “destabilising activities” within the EU.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Ukraine, Russia free 200 POWs each in latest swap amid stalled peace talks
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Exchange comes amid a deadlock in US-brokered negotiations to end the four-year war between the two countries.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iranian warship sunk by the US was sailing home after taking part in an exhibition hosted by India
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump says regime change in Cuba is ‘question of time’ after Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Trump administration has tightened sanctions meant to degrade Cuban economy and threatened to topple government.
Matched: sanctions(+2), economy(+2)

item.title: Trump Justice Department aims to limit ethics probes into its lawyers
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Ukraine's military drone guru says the next phase of Russia's Shahed war will be all about new extreme speeds
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Oil spill disrupts livelihoods in Mexico's Veracruz state
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
JICACAL, Mexico, March 5 - Coastal residents in the Mexican state of Veracruz are concerned about the recent appearance of oil on local beaches, which has disrupted their livelihoods, fearing it could contaminate a nearby lagoon where communities farm fish and shrimp.
Matched: ai(+3)
